description: A server for reading, writing, and manipulating Microsoft Excel files, including sheet management, cell operations, table creation, formatting, and screen capture capabilities.

tools.name: excel_describe_sheets
tools.description: List all sheet information of a specified Excel file, including sheet names, indices, and visibility status.

fileAbsolutePath.description: The absolute file system path to the Excel file to be processed.

sheets.description: List of all sheets contained in the Excel file.

name.description: The name of the sheet as displayed in Excel.

index.description: The zero-based index position of the sheet within the workbook.

visibility.description: The visibility state of the sheet (e.g., 'visible', 'hidden', 'veryHidden').

tools.name: excel_read_sheet
tools.description: Read cell values from a specified Excel sheet, with optional support for displaying formulas and style information.

fileAbsolutePath.description: The absolute file system path to the Excel file to be processed.

sheetName.description: The name of the sheet within the Excel file to operate on.

cellRange.description: The range of cells to read in Excel A1 notation (e.g., 'A1:C10'). If omitted, reads the entire used range.

showFormula.description: When true, returns cell formulas instead of calculated values.

showStyle.description: When true, includes style information (font, fill, borders) for each cell.

values.description: A 2D array containing the cell values (or formulas) read from the specified range.

cellRange.description: The actual cell range that was read in Excel A1 notation.

sheetName.description: The name of the sheet from which data was read.

tools.name: excel_screen_capture
tools.description: Capture a screenshot image of a specified Excel sheet or cell range. This feature is only available on Windows.

fileAbsolutePath.description: The absolute file system path to the Excel file to be processed.

sheetName.description: The name of the sheet within the Excel file to operate on.

cellRange.description: The range of cells to capture in Excel A1 notation (e.g., 'A1:C10'). If omitted, captures the entire visible area.

imagePath.description: The absolute file path where the captured screenshot image was saved.

sheetName.description: The name of the sheet that was captured.

cellRange.description: The cell range that was captured in Excel A1 notation.

tools.name: excel_write_to_sheet
tools.description: Write values to a specified range in an Excel sheet, with the option to create a new sheet or write to an existing one.

fileAbsolutePath.description: The absolute file system path to the Excel file to be processed.

sheetName.description: The name of the sheet within the Excel file to operate on.

newSheet.description: When true, creates a new sheet with the specified name; when false, writes to an existing sheet.

cellRange.description: The target range of cells to write to in Excel A1 notation (e.g., 'A1:C10').

values.description: A 2D array of values to write to the cells. Formulas must start with '=' (e.g., '=SUM(A1:A10)').

status.description: The result status of the write operation (e.g., 'success', 'failed').

fileAbsolutePath.description: The absolute file path of the Excel file that was modified.

sheetName.description: The name of the sheet where data was written.

tools.name: excel_create_table
tools.description: Create a formatted Excel table from a specified cell range within a sheet.

fileAbsolutePath.description: The absolute file system path to the Excel file to be processed.

sheetName.description: The name of the sheet within the Excel file to operate on.

cellRange.description: The range of cells to convert into a table in Excel A1 notation (e.g., 'A1:C10').

tableName.description: The unique name to assign to the newly created table.
The name of the table that was created.

cellRange.description: The cell range that the table occupies in Excel A1 notation.

sheetName.description: The name of the sheet containing the created table.

tools.name: excel_copy_sheet
tools.description: Copy an existing sheet to create a new sheet within the same Excel workbook.

fileAbsolutePath.description: The absolute file system path to the Excel file to be processed.

srcSheetName.description: The name of the source sheet to copy from.

dstSheetName.description: The name for the new destination sheet to be created.

srcSheetName.description: The name of the source sheet that was copied.

dstSheetName.description: The name of the newly created destination sheet.

fileAbsolutePath.description: The absolute file path of the Excel file containing the copied sheet.

tools.name: excel_format_range
tools.description: Apply formatting styles (borders, fonts, fills, number formats) to a specified range of cells in an Excel sheet.

fileAbsolutePath.description: The absolute file system path to the Excel file to be processed.

sheetName.description: The name of the sheet within the Excel file to operate on.

cellRange.description: The range of cells to format in Excel A1 notation (e.g., 'A1:C3').

styles.description: A 2D array of style objects corresponding to each cell in the range. Each style object may contain properties: border, font, fill, numFmt, decimalPlaces.

status.description: The result status of the formatting operation (e.g., 'success', 'failed').

formattedRange.description: The cell range that was formatted in Excel A1 notation.

sheetName.description: The name of the sheet where formatting was applied.
